title: Michigan Disability Examiner Rates (MDCS Compensation Plan Section A, eff 10/1/2025)
description: Michigan DDS examiner series — Disability Examiner levels 9/10/P11/12 (pay schedule W22, SEIU 517M HSS) — and the Disability Exam Manager levels 13/14/15 (NERE), with levels verified from the official MI Civil Service Commission job specification and hourly base min/max from the official MDCS Compensation Plan Section A (eff 10/1/2025). Hourly ranges: Disability Examiner $25.17-$42.60/hr across levels (annualized ~$52,354-$88,608); Disability Exam Manager $31.72-$58.49/hr (~$65,978-$121,659). Administering agency MDHHS DDS. Annual figures are derived (hourly * 2080).

columns.name: classes.<class>.level
columns.description: MI Civil Service level (9/10/P11/12 examiner; 13/14/15 manager).

columns.name: classes.<class>.hourly_min
columns.description: Base hourly minimum for the level (MDCS Section A).

columns.name: classes.<class>.hourly_max
columns.description: Base hourly maximum for the level.

source.publisher: Michigan Civil Service Commission / MDCS; MI Dept of Health and Human Services (MDHHS) Disability Determination Services
source.title: MDCS Compensation Plan Section A (eff 10/1/2025) + MI Civil Service Disability Examiner / Disability Exam Manager job specs

update_cadence: annual MDCS compensation plan (Oct 1) / SEIU 517M CBA cycle
notes: Authoritative: class titles/levels from the official MI Civil Service Commission job spec (Disability Examiner 9/10/P11/12 on schedule W22; Disability Exam Manager 13/14/15) and hourly base min/max from the official MDCS Compensation Plan Section A eff 10/1/2025 (read directly from the PDF). Class-level full ranges cross-confirm the MCSC online job-spec pay-range page ($25.89-$42.60 examiner; $31.72-$58.49 manager). Annual = hourly * 2080 (DERIVED, annual_is_derived flag). Corrections: examiner class is 'Disability Examiner' on schedule W22 (prior 'P-11/P-12 grade' guess conflated MI level codes with grades); SEIU 517M HSS represents the W22 examiner unit, managers are NERE (exempt). SEIU 517M HSS CBA step terms not separately verified (cba_terms_verified false).
